summary: Iteration 139: MixerContext Migration Testing. All core features verified working. MixerProvider wraps app correctly, useMixer() accessible from CosmicMixerPage and SmartDock. Audio state persists across client-side navigation (React Router). SmartDock MixerPanel has live controls (volume slider, mute toggle, active layer count, Stop All button).
context_for_next_testing_agent: MixerContext migration complete. Audio state persists via React Context when using client-side navigation (React Router). Full page reloads reset state (expected). Back button on mixer page intentionally stops all audio before navigating. SmartDock MixerPanel at data-testid='dock-mixer-panel' shows live controls when sounds are active.

mixer_context_provider.provider_wraps_app: PASS - MixerProvider wraps app in App.js between TempoProvider and SensoryProvider
mixer_context_provider.useMixer_accessible: PASS - useMixer() hook accessible from CosmicMixerPage and SmartDock

cosmic_mixer_page_rendering.mood_presets_section: PASS - Mood Presets accordion visible with Deep Sleep, Focus Flow, etc.
cosmic_mixer_page_rendering.solfeggio_frequency_section: PASS - Solfeggio Frequency accordion visible with all frequencies
cosmic_mixer_page_rendering.ambient_sound_section: PASS - Ambient Sound accordion visible with Rain, Ocean, Wind, etc.
cosmic_mixer_page_rendering.world_instruments_section: PASS - World Instruments accordion visible with Sitar, Tanpura, etc.
cosmic_mixer_page_rendering.master_fx_bus_section: PASS - Master FX Bus accordion visible

frequency_toggle.click_528hz_activates: PASS - Clicking mixer-freq-528 activates frequency (green highlight)
frequency_toggle.active_badge_shows: PASS - '1 active' badge appears in Solfeggio Frequency section header

ambient_sound_toggle.click_rain_activates: PASS - Clicking mixer-sound-rain activates Rain sound

world_instruments_toggle.click_sitar_activates: PASS - Clicking mixer-drone-sitar-drone activates Sitar drone

sticky_footer_controls.footer_visible: PASS - Sticky footer with data-testid='mixer-sticky-footer' visible
sticky_footer_controls.volume_slider: PASS - Volume slider with data-testid='sticky-volume' functional
sticky_footer_controls.mute_toggle: PASS - Mute button with data-testid='sticky-mute' functional
sticky_footer_controls.stop_all_button: PASS - Stop All button with data-testid='sticky-stop-all' functional

smartdock_mixer_panel.mixer_button_clickable: PASS - Mixer button with data-testid='dock-mixer' clickable
smartdock_mixer_panel.panel_opens: PASS - MixerPanel popup with data-testid='dock-mixer-panel' opens
smartdock_mixer_panel.volume_slider: PASS - Volume slider with data-testid='dock-volume-slider' present
smartdock_mixer_panel.mute_toggle: PASS - Mute toggle with data-testid='dock-mute-toggle' present
smartdock_mixer_panel.active_layer_count: PASS - Shows '1 layer active' when sounds are playing
smartdock_mixer_panel.stop_all_button: PASS - Stop All button with data-testid='dock-stop-all' visible when sounds active
smartdock_mixer_panel.open_console_button: PASS - 'Open Console' button with data-testid='dock-open-mixer' present
smartdock_mixer_panel.full_mixer_page_button: PASS - 'Full Mixer Page' button with data-testid='dock-open-mixer-page' present

audio_persistence.state_persists_client_navigation: PASS - Audio state persists when navigating via React Router (clicking nav links, SmartDock buttons)
audio_persistence.state_resets_on_page_reload: EXPECTED - Full page reload resets React state (normal behavior)
audio_persistence.back_button_stops_audio: EXPECTED - Back button on mixer page intentionally calls stopAll() before navigating

mood_presets.deep_sleep_preset: PASS - Deep Sleep preset button with data-testid='mood-deep-sleep' found

waveform_visualizer.canvas_visible: PASS - Waveform visualizer canvas with data-testid='waveform-visualizer' visible
waveform_visualizer.shows_activity: PASS - Waveform shows animated activity when sounds are playing
